title: Case 47: The 6 Minutes That Were Erased...
description: In 1977, someone hijacked Southern Television for exactly six minutes, then wiped every record of what aired. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 47: The 6 Minutes That Were Erased From Television History
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: November 1977: Someone with advanced technical knowledge hijacked Southern Television's broadcast for exactly six minutes. When it ended, all transmission logs had been wiped clean. What happened during those missing minutes? Subscribe for more Department files.
